series_description: Documents related to the Payment Card Program including the transactions, attachments, payments, and other materials.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for four years or until audited by the Auditor of State ; Paper: Retain for four years or until audited by the Auditor of State

series_description: Record used to document purchase orders, outstanding payments, and related materials.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for three years complete fiscal years ; Paper: Retain for three years complete fiscal years

series_description: Agency records related to forgery documentation, requests for reissuances, stops and cancellations, voided reports, and all other warrant records.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five years ; Paper: Retain for five years

series_description: Petty cash fund audits for various state agencies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current year and three previous years. ; Electronic: Retain current year and three previous years.

series_description: Records relating to the audits conducted by OBM's Office of Internal Audit. Records under this schedule include, but are not limited to, Internal Audit's annual or revised internal audit plan and annual report, assurance and consulting engagements, audit work papers, procedures, testing, process reviews, memorandums, findings, recommendations, preliminary and final audit reports, suspected fraud or illegal activity and related referrals, corrective actions plans, and other supporting audit documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 5 years from the issuance date of the corresponding audit report ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years from the issuance date of the corresponding audit report

series_description: Documents submitted to Agency by the supplier detailing goods received or services rendered, requesting payment.
retention_statement: Paper: Pursuant to R.C. 2305.06, retain for six complete fiscal years after contract expires ; Electronic: Pursuant to R.C. 2305.06, retain for six complete fiscal years after contract expires

series_description: Cash Receipt Records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two complete fiscal years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released ; Electronic: Retain for two complete fiscal years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released

series_description: Memorandum and supporting documentation submitted to the Director requesting activity authorized by law.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for four complete fiscal years and ; Paper: Retain for four complete fiscal years and

series_description: Includes files and methodologies related to revenue sources, revenue projections, and estimates on revenue by tax.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Documents related to petty cash accounts.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Documentation submitted by employee requesting reimbursement for Agency related travel.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 4 years ; Electronic: Retain for 4 years

series_description: All legal and financial documents, including but not limited to bond counsel’s legal opinion, the bond purchase agreement, final cash flows, and credit rating results associated with the offering of a new issuance of municipal securities.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for three years after bond has matured and ; Electronic: Retain for three years after bond has matured and

series_description: All records concerning federal grants to state agencies which document the application, award, expenditure, use, and monitoring of federal monies.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five years or until state and federal audits have been conducted, corresponding audit reports released, audit resolutions issued or resolved, and in accordance with the applicable federal regulations regarding the retention and maintenance of records (see 2 CRF 200.334). ; Paper: Retain for five years or until state and federal audits have been conducted, corresponding audit reports released, audit resolutions issued or resolved, and in accordance with the applicable federal regulations regarding the retention and maintenance of records (see 2 CRF 200.334).

series_description: Vouchers and related materials including Intrastate Vouchers.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 4 years ; Electronic: Retain for 4 years

series_description: Written requests and documentation regarding exceptions to the travel expense requirements required in Chapter 126 of the Ohio Administrative Code.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 years ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years

series_description: Service records, compilation sheets, operation maintenance reports of licensed vehicles, warranty and guarantee statements, operating manual, shop-work orders, and other related reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for three years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released ; Paper: Retain for three years or until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released

series_description: Includes but not limited to state affirmative action plans; EEOC and OCRC materials; OSHA reports; accident, health, and safety records, and documents relating to Civil Rights and Title VII.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for seven years from the effective date of employee separation ; Paper: Retain for seven years from the effective date of employee separation

series_description: Manuals, videos, and other materials produced by the agency for employee training.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Controlling Board request forms and other relevant or attached documentation pertaining to operating requests.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for four complete fiscal years and ; Paper: Retain for four complete fiscal years and

series_description: Press releases, news, bulletins, or other similar communications issued by an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value and ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value and

series_title: Purchase Orders, Supplier Contracts, and Related Documents
series_description: Documents authorizing the purchase of goods or services and documents or other encumbering materials supporting those authorizations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Pursuant to R.C. 2305.06, retain for six complete fiscal years after contract expires ; Paper: Pursuant to R.C. 2305.06, retain for six complete fiscal years after contract expires

series_description: Contracts entered into by the agency, including RFPs, RFQs, and other supporting documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain six years after the expiration of the contract ; Paper: Retain six years after the expiration of the contract

series_description: Preliminary and official statements or similar documents relating to an issue of municipal securities expected to be issued.
retention_statement: Electronic: If issued, retain until maturity and ; Paper: If issued, retain until maturity and

series_description: Minutes and supporting records documenting internal meetings of agency staff.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Original computer printout, instructions and work sheets used to complete equipment inventory reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 2 years ; Paper: Retain for 2 years

series_description: Documents regarding suppliers of the state and their accounts.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years ; Electronic: Retain 4 years

series_description: Records relating to routine memorandums, notifications, or other general correspondence between the Controlling Board President or Secretary and Members of the Controlling Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two complete fiscal years ; Electronic: Retain for two complete fiscal years

series_description: Documentation of the disposal or transfer of agency records and those related to records management.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for three years ; Electronic: Retain for three years

series_title: Executive Budget for the State of Ohio
series_description: Biennial budget request prepared by OBM in conjunction with the Governor’s Office.
retention_statement: Electronic: Keep one copy permanently and transfer one copy to State Archives. ; Paper: Keep one copy permanently and transfer one copy to State Archives.

series_description: Records relating to systems, software, applications, and other technology necessary to OBM functions, including records on implementation of software, logs, system changes, and other information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded or obsolete. ; Paper: Retain until superseded or obsolete.

series_description: Copies of audit reports issued by the Auditor of State, federal government, or other audits delivered to OBM. This includes audits and audit materials related to OBM or statewide activity, including the Controlling Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five years ; Electronic: Retain five years
